name: Tim Book
description:
Timonthy Donald Book (aka Tim Book) is the current CEO of Meeple after Steve Cobs.
After Cobs' death in II18 he takes over Meeple andis WAY MORE NICER AND LESS ABUSIVE THAN COBS WAS! anyways he created the Mephone17 Pro and treats the older Meeple products like his children.
creator: Creammm
